message:
🐛 fix: contribute panel auth state detection (#8494) (#8495)

The useGitHubRewards hook bailed out early when localStorage had no
token, which is the normal state for cookie-only sessions (#6590).
This caused githubRewards to stay null, showing 0 coins and the
"Log in with GitHub to see contributions" message even for
authenticated users.

Fix: check the kc-has-session localStorage hint (set after successful
/auth/refresh) as an alternative to a Bearer token, and pass
credentials: 'include' on the fetch so the HttpOnly kc_auth cookie
is sent for cookie-only sessions.

Fixes #8494

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
